evals.prompt: Create an interactive customer journey map for a SaaS onboarding experience with 4 phases: Awareness (landing page, pricing page), Sign Up (registration, email verification), Onboarding (product tour, first project, invite team), and Adoption (daily usage, feature discovery). Include emotion scores showing excitement during sign up dropping to frustration during onboarding then recovering. Add pain points and opportunities for each phase.
evals.expected_output: A standalone HTML file with D3.js rendering a grid-based journey map with 4 phase columns, emotion curve SVG showing the dip during onboarding, pain points in red-accented cells, opportunities in green-accented cells, and interactive hover/click behaviors.

evals.prompt: Build me a customer journey map for an e-commerce purchase experience: Browse → Compare → Purchase → Delivery → Post-Purchase. Include touchpoints (website, mobile app, email, phone), role badges for the teams involved (Marketing, Product, Support, Logistics), and a sentiment curve. Show pain points around checkout friction and delivery delays.
evals.expected_output: A standalone HTML file with 5 phases, touchpoint row with channel icons, role badge pills for 4 teams, emotion curve with data points, pain points highlighted in red, and proper grid layout with sticky headers.

evals.prompt:
Create a journey map from this data:

Phase: Discovery
- Steps: Google Search, Read Reviews, Visit Website
- Emotion: 0.5, 0.6, 0.7
- Pain: Too many options, hard to trust reviews
- Opportunity: Add comparison tool

Phase: Evaluation
- Steps: Free Trial, Demo Call, Internal Discussion
- Emotion: 0.8, 0.7, 0.4
- Pain: Trial too short, demo scheduling friction
- Opportunity: Extend trial, self-serve demo

Phase: Purchase
- Steps: Procurement, Contract, Payment
- Emotion: 0.3, 0.2, 0.5
- Pain: Complex procurement process, legal review delays
- Opportunity: Streamline contract templates

Phase: Implementation
- Steps: Setup, Training, Go-Live
- Emotion: 0.6, 0.7, 0.9
- Pain: Integration complexity
- Opportunity: Pre-built integrations
evals.expected_output: A standalone HTML file accurately rendering the provided structured data as a journey map with 4 phases and 12 steps, emotion curve matching the scores (dip during Purchase phase), pain points and opportunities correctly placed in their cells.
